title: Ruby PvP
description: A 1.8 PvP texture pack that turns diamonds into rubies. Low fire, See Through Inv, Custom sky, Custom Font and Ore Outline are included.
body:
This is a PvP Texture Pack for **1.8.9** (1.8.x). Like other Texture Packs made Emeralds to Rubies, this Texture Pack make the Diamonds to Rubies. [See Through Inv](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/see-through-inv) is Included. Low on Fire and Ore Outline too, but this did I do ^w^.
<details>
<summary>See Through Inv Pic</summary>

![See Through Inv](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62dbbba971acd51f1bfffcd7988f48d9c74dcb2d_0.webp)

</details>

For the Custom Sky is [OptiFine for 1.8.9](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.8.9_HD_U_M5.jar) or another Custom Sky Mod needed. [(OptiFine Home)](https://optifine.net/home)
<details>
<summary>Custom Sky Pics</summary>

![Day](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ddbbb18424a642850be59a0ea1e6d58e26d128f.png)![Night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c5140d962dda20a7179261f78c0b1c531ed2ec.png)

</details>



Credits: [Xetheon](https://modrinth.com/user/Zetheon) for the Font [(Geometric Font Legacy)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/geometric-font) (License: [CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0 ](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/deed.en))
<details>
<summary>Custom Font Pic</summary>

![Custom Font Pic](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-geometric-font/raw/legacy/images/display.png)
Yes, more Credits to [Xetheon](https://modrinth.com/user/Zetheon), because he did this Photo.
</details>



Every Other Thing did I do or has the [MIT License](https://de.wikipedia.org/wiki/MIT-Lizenz)
